summary:
Both zinc oxide-eugenoil cement and polycarboxylate cement achieve dental adhesion through chelation, where organic acids (eugenolic acid or polyacrylic acid) bind calcium ions in dentin. This specific mechanistic similarity defines their shared functional property among these restorative materials.  
$\boxed{C}$

$\boxed{C}$. Answer choice: C
